creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Update of benchmarks/postal 0.65 -> 0.66
- port now honours CFLAGS, CPPFLAGS and LDFLAGS
- PTHREAD_CFLAGS and PTHREAD_LIBS are implemented correctly

portlint -A:
no fatal errors

Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/postal-0.66.log

files/patch-Makefile.in
files/patch-configure
